title: Payment of tax
doc_html:
§2251.  Payment of tax

The tax determined to be due under this Chapter shall be due January 1, 1985, and payable on January 1, 1985.  

Acts 1984, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 8, §1, eff. March 27, 1984.
doc_text:
§2251.  Payment of tax
The tax determined to be due under this Chapter shall be due January 1, 1985, and payable on January 1, 1985.
Acts 1984, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 8, §1, eff. March 27, 1984.
